actuals.note: No history.json found — actuals unavailable. Log activities to data/history.json to enable week-over-week tracking.

recommendation.summary: It's July 4th weekend in Ann Arbor with an extreme heat warning (heat index 105°F+) through today — all outdoor workouts move indoors to the YMCA, and the week is naturally heavy on free cultural events. With no history to balance against, the key nudge is: don't let the holiday weekend collapse into passive screen time. One professional touchpoint (the GovAI AI Policy Program deadline is July 5 — tomorrow), one cultural outing, one social connection each day is enough.

suggested.title: Ann Arbor YMCA — indoor gym or pool (open 5:30am–9pm weekdays, 7am–6pm weekends). Mandatory this week given extreme heat.
Ann Arbor Art Fair — July 16–17, free, 30 city blocks and nearly 1,000 juried artists. Capstone event of the Ann Arbor stay.
Subsurface 2026 CFP — deadline July 17. Virtual data/AI conference; submit a talk on AI governance or data strategy before leaving Ann Arbor.
